announcements.title: sf-pi v0.33.1 — sf-llm-gateway-internal: make gpt-5.5 agentic-safe
sf-pi requires pi 0.72 or newer
announcements.body: Current sf-pi builds use pi 0.72 APIs for model thinking maps and per-model gateway routing. Run `pi update` before upgrading sf-pi; PI_CODING_AGENT_SESSION_DIR remains supported for relocating session storage.
